content.en:
Chaos Patio, Deep.

Ye Tian began to practice in retreat, and now he has reached the ultimate in domination, and from the perspective of cultivation, it is almost impossible to advance.

Therefore, he cultivated for a few days, adjusted his mental state to an excellent state, and began to impact the Heavenly Venerable realm.

He was very familiar with the impact of the Tianzun realm, after all, several clones had also impacted the Tianzun realm, and there was no possibility of failure.

But Ye Tian's impact this time was different, he needed to condense a half-step chaotic life body, and he was also the first time to condense a half-step chaotic life body, so he had to be careful and careful.

Once he fails, he probably won't have a chance to hit again.

It is also necessary to condense a half-step chaotic life body, for example, the creatures of this universe almost cannot condense a half-step chaotic life body, because it needs a sixth-order life to condense a half-step chaotic life body.

If you can't even reach the sixth-order life level, and you delusionally want to condense a half-step chaotic life body, then there is only one result, and that is the physical body collapses and dies.

Ye Tian is a seventh-order lifeform, and he has even reached the late stage of the seventh-order life level, and he is not far from the seventh-order life level Great Perfection.

Therefore, he fully met the basic conditions for condensing a half-step chaotic life body.

"If you want to condense the body of a half-step chaotic life, you need to absorb a wisp of chaotic origin breath at the moment you hit the realm of Tianzun, and cast the supreme foundation of the half-step chaotic life body, so that you can completely condense the half-step chaotic life body. And if I want to absorb the Chaos Origin Breath, I can't do it with a weak soul, so I must break through all three aspects of Essence, Qi and Spirit, and use the power of the Heavenly Venerable Soul to absorb a trace of the Chaos Origin Breath into the body, and I can't make a mistake!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Half a month later.

Ye Tian officially began to break through.

"Boom !!"

The physical body is transformed, the divine power is transformed, and the soul is also transformed.

At the same moment, Ye Tian completed the breakthrough in the three cultivation paths of the essence qi and spirit, and the three paths entered the realm of Tianzun at the same time.

Countless Chaos Vitality poured into his body around him, and every wisp of Chaos Vitality here was more precious than the Divine Crystal in the outside world, even comparable to a Chaos Crystal.

And with so many Chaos Vitality, that amount was so huge, so there was no need for Ye Tian to prepare other resources.

He has no shortage of breakthrough energy!

"Chaos Origin Breath, bring me !!"

Ye Tian's soul turned into a pair of big hands and grabbed a wisp of chaotic origin aura in the depths of the chaotic courtyard.

The Chaos Origin Aura seemed to want to dodge, but Ye Tian's soul was very strong, and Ye Tian's strength was too terrifying, so this wisp of Chaos Origin Aura could not escape, and it was caught in an instant.

The soul returned with both hands, and that wisp of chaotic origin aura also entered Ye Tian's body.

Click!!

Ye Tian's body began to crack, this was not a real physical collapse, but a remodeling.

If you want to condense a half-step chaotic life body, you must reshape and reinvent it.

Of course, the accumulation is not the same, and the condensed half-step chaotic life body is also different, if the ordinary genius in the chaos is lucky enough to condense the half-step chaotic life body, it is about equivalent to one thousandth of a chaotic life body, and the best of them can reach one percent of the chaotic life body, and the limit is fifty percent!

Because once it exceeds fifty percent, it will completely transform into a chaotic life form, causing a real great transformation.

But the realm does not reach the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and it is impossible for the physical body to reach the level of chaotic lifeforms, even if the chaos power makes a move, it is useless, it is against the rules of chaos.

Rumble!!!

The sea of chaotic vitality poured into Ye Tian's body, accelerating the transformation of his body, allowing Ye Tian's body to evolve step by step towards a half-step chaotic life body.

At the same time, Ye Tian's aura became more and more terrifying, reaching an incredible level.

Time passed little by little, fortunately, the Chaos Patio had the effect of temporarily blocking the rules of the universe, otherwise Ye Tian's thunder tribulation would have come a long time ago.

this day.

Ye Tian's physical body completely completed its transformation, and a faint chaotic rule pattern appeared on his body, exuding an aura that made the Supreme Beings fearful.

The half-step Chaos Life Body is done!

"Fifty percent! I actually condensed the extreme half-step chaotic life body!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He knew that his accumulation was very deep, but he didn't expect that he would reach the limit of fifty percent and reach the half-step Chaos Life Body!

In the midst of chaos, only that kind of true top genius can be expected to condense a fifty and a half-step chaotic life body!

Although this is just the beginning of Chaos' cultivation and is not too important, it also reflects a situation, Ye Tian's foundation is too good, and the future potential is very great.

It can be said that even if it is useless to copy talent in the future, he Ye Tian is enough to become a true Tianjiao in the chaos.

The successful condensation of the half-step chaotic life body also replenished the divine power and soul, making Ye Tian's divine power more refined and powerful, and the soul strength also reached a new level.

"The strength is much, much stronger than before the breakthrough!"

Ye Tian sighed.

As for how powerful it was, he didn't have a specific division standard, but he felt that he should not be weaker than the First Divine Lord, or even much stronger than the First Divine Lord.

"It's useless for me here, it's time to get out!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

Ye Tian teleported to the entrance and exit of the Chaos Courtyard, and immediately stepped out of the Chaos Courtyard.

......

At the entrance of the Chaos Courtyard, the First Divine Lord had been staying here, he was not waiting for Ye Tian to come out, but he was worried about what Ye Tian would do, so he was here while cultivating and waiting.

Suddenly.

He felt Ye Tian's breath, and Ye Tian came out.

"How could it be ......?"

The expression of the First God Lord changed drastically.

He found that Ye Tian was already in the Tianzun realm, and the aura on his body was too terrifying, making him feel extremely dangerous.

Thundered!!!!

In the Divine Realm Void, the Cloud of Thunder Tribulation that covered the entire world appeared.

"The Thunder Tribulation of the Rebels!"

All of a sudden, all the Protoss powerhouses in the entire God Realm were shocked.

The Thunder Tribulation will only hurt the Tribulators, not others, so the Protoss people will not worry about the Divine Realm being destroyed.

Whoa!!

One by one, the Supreme, the Heavenly Venerable, and the Lord appeared beside the First Divine Lord.

One of the Supremes asked, "First Divine Master, what is the situation?"

"The Ten Thousand Laws Master of the Human Race has broken through to the Heavenly Venerable realm, and now he is already a true Supreme. He's crossing the Thunder Tribulation of the Rebels, let's just watch it! By the way, it's the first time we've seen the Thunder Tribulation of the Heaven-Defying Heavens at the level of the Heavenly Venerable!"

The first god is the main way.

Other supreme beings are also a little bit, although the anti-heaven is expected to be transcendent, but it is only a hope, and the anti-heaven who can really grow to the supreme level only exists in the legends of the previous cosmic eras, and this cosmic era has not yet given birth to a supreme level anti-heaven!

Therefore, understanding the power of the Thunder Tribulation will naturally help the rebels in the future.

Under the thunderstorm.

Ye Tian was very calm, not to mention that he had now condensed a fifty percent and a half-step chaotic life body, even if he hadn't condensed a half-step chaotic life body, he would not take this kind of thunder tribulation in his eyes.

I saw him sitting cross-legged, very calmly stabilizing the foundation, ignoring the thunderstorm above.
